---
title: "TimeSeries Analysis – Murine example run"
author: "Yohan Lefol"
date: '`r format(Sys.Date(), "%d. %B %Y")`'
bibliography: references.bib
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{subfig}
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
  
---
## Differental gene expression analysis
[@love2014moderated]
[@smyth2005limma]
[@nilsen2013identifying]
[@kolberg2020gprofiler2;@raudvere2019g]
[@gu2016complex]
[@timeseriesexperiment]
[@gu2016complex]
[@brionne2019viseago]
[@yu2010gosemsim;@wang2007new]
[@jassal2020reactome] and KEGG[@kanehisa2017kegg]
[@GOdb_ref]

# References
